Services.title: Clear, modern digital solutions ready to grow with your business.

items.title: Professional websites
items.description: Modern, fast and polished websites designed to build trust and turn visitors into opportunities.

items.title: Landing pages
items.description: Pages focused on attracting clients, validating ideas or launching services quickly.

items.title: Web applications
items.description: Internal tools, dashboards, MVPs and custom solutions for your business.

items.title: Maintenance
items.description: Support, improvements, updates and continuous evolution for your website or application.

items.title: Basic automation
items.description: Automation for forms, emails, integrations and simple repetitive tasks.

Projects.title: Interactive demos that showcase real digital solutions.
Projects.description: These conceptual projects are designed to demonstrate how modern websites, dashboards and automation workflows can help businesses look more professional and operate more efficiently.
Projects.ctaTitle: Looking for something similar for your business?
Projects.ctaDescription: I can adapt this type of solution into a real website, internal tool or automation workflow tailored to your business needs.

items.title: CRM Dashboard

items.title: Restaurant Landing
items.description: Visual restaurant landing page with menu showcase, reservations, reviews and premium aesthetics.

Process.title: Simple, clear work without unnecessary complexity.

Tech.title: Modern technology, explained simply.
Tech.description: I work with modern tools to build fast, maintainable and scalable products. I can adapt to the project or propose a simple solution depending on the goal.

Contact.title: Do you have an idea, a website to improve or a process to automate?
